text.p: I am presently working on Speech Recognition algorithm for Nigerian English as part of my PhD program when I read your paper "Nigeria English: Phonology" in a journal paper which I can not find again. When I searched for it on the inter-net, I have to pay to read it which for now I dont have enough money to pay for it.

What I really need from you is, if possible to send me a soft copy which I promise I will send back to you after reading it without making a copy of it, and I will properly reference the work and acknoledge your help in my research.
